description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees. The structure features a combination of large windows and sliding glass doors, allowing for ample natural light and views of the garden. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by a flat or low-pitched roof. A driveway leads to a spacious attached garage, and a small swimming pool is visible in the backyard, enclosed by privacy fencing and landscaping. The property includes a paved walkway, shrubbery, and a mix of open and semi-private outdoor spaces. The overall design is modern and functional, with an emphasis on indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large windows, attached garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and privacy fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, large windows, and a broad lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and privacy fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio area, and extensive glass doors opening to the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the lawn, trees, and the arrangement of rooms and windows along the side facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
